tick_over_tick_delta_vs_1300.interpretation: STRATEGY QUIET TICK #2. Second consecutive 30-min window with zero trades, zero fills, zero rejections. Cap gap (7.44 pp binding above the 0.65 deployment cap) is the proximate cause: with admission slot blocked outright and three OPEN orders sitting at limit prices that have not been hit in 75-197 min, there is no organic path to a new BUY without either (i) a SELL freeing deployment, (ii) an OPEN-order fill (which itself would still leave the cap binding), or (iii) the strategy reaching for a SELL-then-BUY swap inside its conviction set. None of these have materialized. The silence is structurally CONTROLLED — the 12:00-12:14 4-trade burst confirms strategy is not paralysis-stuck, and the 12:14:33 SUNPHARMA BUY → 12:14:45 INDUSINDBK SELL → 12:14:55 PHARMABEES BUY 22-second sequence demonstrates the strategy still knows how to swap when it wants to. Risk level held at MEDIUM.

actions_taken: NO LEVER CHANGES. All seven active overrides held at 12:30 levels: min_confidence=0.65, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.65, default_sl_pct=0.015, min_sl_pct=0.01, max_sl_pct=0.04, max_sector_pct=0.22. Zero pre-armed triggers fired in this 30-min window — second consecutive zero-activity tick. Tightening levers in the absence of a firing trigger would be theatrical, would deepen admission friction without addressing any live risk vector, and could over-rotate against a regime where the strategy is already cap-induced quiet (further constraint risks converting controlled silence into permanent paralysis on next session phase).

Risk level HELD at MEDIUM (not raised to HIGH or CRITICAL, not lowered to LOW). Drivers: (i) composite distress meta-trigger D dormant on all 3 legs; (ii) Power cluster holds at 19.77% with 2.23 pp buffer; (iii) cadence-quality controls (0.65 deployment cap, 0.22 sector cap, 0.65 confidence floor) all binding as designed; (iv) BFSI grandfathered breach RESOLVED status holds (17.62% < 22% cap, 4.38 pp buffer); (v) realized P&L positive +₹131.38, ~₹30,178 buffer to base 3% loss gate. Lowering to LOW would be premature: 7.44 pp deployment binding gap, 2.23 pp Power buffer, 3 OPEN orders ageing without fills, and a 75-min strategy silence approaching the 14:00 Trigger S threshold together represent unfinished structural work — not LOW-risk steady state.

Logged the 75-min strategy silence as observability data — NOT escalated. The silence is structurally distinct from the Day-2 6h+ paralysis silence: this one is on a binding 0.65 deployment cap with the strategy having executed a 4-trade burst at 12:00-12:14 (recent enough to confirm decision-layer health). At 14:00 (105 min silence) Trigger S fires for posture review — assess whether the 0.65 cap is over-restrictive given cap-induced silence persists across two consecutive 30-min ticks.

TATAPOWER 13 min from the 210-min Trigger H flag. HINDZINC 13 min from the 180-min Trigger L flag. No risk-monitor lever — order management remains a strategy-layer decision; risk monitor only intervenes on cluster/cap/loss-gate vectors.

Pre-armed triggers from 13:00 carry forward to 14:00 unchanged in spec; only their thresholds tick closer to firing as time passes (silence extension, order ageing). Re-arm thresholds for Trigger F (8th BUY), Trigger I (5th Power name OR Power >22%), Trigger M (2+ OPEN fills + filled deployment >65%), Trigger N (any BUY without SELL between 13:30-14:00), and Trigger P (recycle pattern) all remain unchanged.
